evidenceSnippetOriginal: It is important to respect the privacy and copyright of the content being worked with... If data is passed on to AI-based tools or released for them, it must be clarified in advance that no rights are being violated.
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
